name: Mort Rosenblum
bio: American journalist and author who restored an abandoned olive grove in Provence.
top_work: Olives: The Life and Lore of a Noble Fruit

name: Carol Drinkwater
bio: British author and actress who runs an olive farm above Cannes; writer of olive-grove memoirs.

name: Han Kang
bio: South Korean writer and Nobel laureate in Literature, widely translated into Spanish and English.

name: Min Jin Lee
bio: Korean American novelist whose fiction follows the Korean diaspora across generations.

name: Tom Mueller
bio: American author and investigative journalist who reported on olive oil fraud and quality.
top_work: Extra Virginity: The Sublime and Scandalous World of Olive Oil

name: Helena Attlee
bio: British writer on Italian and Mediterranean gardens, citrus and agrarian landscapes.

name: Jose Luis Acuna
bio: Spanish agronomist from Andalusia specializing in organic olive farming and certification.

name: Maria Dolores Raigon
bio: Spanish researcher in organic agriculture and food quality at a Mediterranean university.
top_work: Agricultura Ecologica y Calidad de los Alimentos

name: Roy Dennis
bio: Scottish ornithologist and conservationist known for raptor monitoring and field guides.

name: Eduardo de Juana
bio: Spanish ornithologist and co-author of standard field guides to the birds of Spain and Europe.

name: Michael Pollan
bio: American journalist who writes on food systems, agriculture and what we eat.

name: Maangchi
bio: Korean cookbook author and teacher who popularized traditional Korean home cooking.

name: Jose Penin
bio: Spanish wine and gastronomy critic and author of authoritative tasting guides.
top_work: Guia Penin de los Vinos de Espana

name: Gerald Brenan
bio: British writer who lived in Andalusia and wrote about Spanish history, culture and village life.

name: Chris Stewart
bio: British author and farmer whose memoirs recount running a mountain farm in the Alpujarras of Andalusia.

name: Yvonne Cho
bio: Korean Spanish food writer documenting the meeting of Korean and Mediterranean kitchens.

name: Vandana Shiva
bio: Indian scholar and activist writing on seed sovereignty, biodiversity and sustainable agriculture.

name: Joan Margarit
bio: Catalan Spanish poet and architect, a major voice in contemporary Spanish-language poetry.

name: David Lindo
bio: Birder and broadcaster known as the Urban Birder, writing accessible guides to watching birds.
top_work: How to Be an Urban Birder

name: Antonio Sandoval
bio: Spanish nature writer and birdwatcher who writes essays on ornithology and slow observation.
